content.full_text:
March 25, 2010

David Bauer
2150 River Plaza Drive, Suite 150
Sacramento, California 95833

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-10-044

Dear Mr. Bauer:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per our telephone conversation of March 25, 2010.

You had requested advice on behalf of former Board of Equalization Member Bill Leonard, who recently stepped down from his post to accept an appointment from the Governor. During our telephone conversation, you stated that Mr. Leonard is no longer on the board and that your questions were no longer applicable to his situation. Accordingly, we have withdrawn your request and will not be issuing a response.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Emelyn Rodriguez
Commission Counsel
